title: Ubiquiti UA-G2-SK - UniFi Access G2 Starter kit
description: The UniFi Access G2 Starter Kit is the second generation of the basic set of components to install the UniFi Access access system . The set is compatible with most electric locks, magnetic locks and a whole range of 12V accessories such as motion sensors, buttons and alarms. The installation of the entire ecosystem is very fast, easy and offers simple management of users , visitors, plans and levels or access permissions via UniFi Access Controller. The set is powered via PoE, which is not… Sample connection diagram with G2 starter kit UniFi Access controller management - management of users / roles / permissions / statistics Note: UniFi Dream Machine Pro is required to operate UniFi Access (1) UniFi Access Door Hub (hub / controller) (1) UniFi Access Reader G2 (reader) (10) UniFi Access Card GPSR Technical support for this product is available on [email protected] email or sending a request via web form . Our technical support is available during this business hours
